modules.name: MCP Foundations & Your First Secure Server
modules.description: MCP's trust model and primitives, then building a first secure server that exposes only shaped, least-privilege answers over a transaction store.

lessons.title: What MCP Is and the Trust Model
topics: Why MCP Exists and How the Roles Fit Together
The MCP Server as a Security Boundary
objects: SCORM: Interactive — What MCP Is and the Trust Model (scorm-lesson-01-what-mcp-is-and-the-trust-model.zip)

lessons.title: MCP Primitives — Tools, Resources, and Prompts
topics: The Three Primitives and What Each Does
The Data-Exposure Surface of Each Primitive
objects: SCORM: Interactive — MCP Primitives — Tools, Resources, and Prompts (scorm-lesson-02-mcp-primitives-tools-resources-prompts.zip)

lessons.title: Building Your First Secure Server with the Python SDK
topics: Setting Up the Python MCP SDK
Connecting a Client and Tracing a Request
objects: SCORM: Interactive — Building Your First Secure Server with the Python SDK (scorm-lesson-03-building-your-first-secure-server.zip)

lessons.title: Exposing Data with Least Privilege — Resources vs Tools
topics: Least Privilege at the MCP Boundary
Resources vs Tools for Data Exposure
objects: SCORM: Interactive — Exposing Data with Least Privilege — Resources vs Tools (scorm-lesson-04-exposing-data-with-least-privilege.zip)

modules.name: Hardening the Boundary
modules.description: Closing the common exposure paths — database access, input validation and output sanitization, authorization, and safe error handling and logging — culminating in the course capstone.

lessons.title: Preventing Database Exposure at the Boundary
topics: Never Hand Over SQL or Connections
objects: SCORM: Interactive — Preventing Database Exposure at the Boundary (scorm-lesson-05-preventing-database-exposure.zip)

lessons.title: Validating Inputs and Sanitizing Returned Data
objects: SCORM: Interactive — Validating Inputs and Sanitizing Returned Data (scorm-lesson-06-validating-inputs-and-sanitizing-data.zip)

lessons.title: Authentication and Authorization for MCP Servers
topics: Authentication vs Authorization at the Server
Least-Privilege Credentials for the Data Store
objects: SCORM: Interactive — Authentication and Authorization for MCP Servers (scorm-lesson-07-authentication-and-authorization.zip)

lessons.title: Secure Error Handling and Logging
topics: Failure Modes That Hold the Boundary
objects: SCORM: Interactive — Secure Error Handling and Logging (scorm-lesson-08-secure-error-handling-and-logging.zip)

lessons.title: Capstone Lab — Shielded Transaction Context
objects: SCORM: Interactive — Capstone Lab — Shielded Transaction Context (scorm-lesson-09-capstone-shielded-transaction-context.zip)
